artifact_exemptions.reason: Runner-loaded golden manifest and registry payload fixtures intentionally preserve external ecosystem filenames and serialized content.
artifact_exemptions.control: Workspace parser, provider, and boundary tests load these fixtures and verify their observable interpretation.
artifact_exemptions.review: Review during the next test-fixture topology migration or before v1.0.

artifact_exemptions.reason: The published GitHub community-health repository contract requires the standard CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md filename.
artifact_exemptions.control: The CI architecture check validates the exact GitHub community-health filename exemption and repository path.
artifact_exemptions.review: Review on the next GitHub community-health template upgrade.

artifact_exemptions.reason: The VS Code extension manifest and published schema URI require this exact schema filename.
artifact_exemptions.control: VS Code manifest contract tests verify the contributed schema path and packaged resource.
artifact_exemptions.review: Review on the next schema URI or extension package layout migration.
